meta.title: Navy Recruits at Boot Camp - Small Arms Weapons Training
meta.description:
Navy recruits at boot camp at Great Lakes Naval Station undergo small arms weapons training during week 4 of boot camp. 

Want to receive weekly updates about what a loved one is doing at boot camp or the ability to send them mail over night? Check out the Sandboxx app: http://www.sandboxx.us/app/yt
